name: The"secret" Recipe for Orange Julius
recipeIngredient: 1 ounce Simple Syrup or Vanilla Extract
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the orange juice into the blender.
2. Add enough ice to fill the blender to three-quarters full.
3. Add water until it just covers the ice.
4. Stir in the simple syrup or vanilla extract and the secret ingredient (instant vanilla pudding mix).
5. Blend until completely smooth.
